milestone.title: Invoice Review Command Center Prototype
milestone.description: High-fidelity UX/UI prototype for an operator-grade invoice review workspace spanning Today, Yesterday, This Week, and This Month with desktop split view, mobile detail flow, and exception-first triage.

umbrellaEpic.title: Umbrella: Invoice Review Experience
umbrellaEpic.body:
## Objective
Create a coherent invoice review experience for finance operators with an exception-first list and a metadata-first drill-down across desktop and mobile.

## Success criteria
- High-fidelity desktop and mobile approval frames exist
- All four presets are represented in one responsive workspace
- Exception-first triage is explicit in list and detail
- Responsive review is complete
- Any unresolved UX debt is converted into explicit follow-up issues

## Child epics
- E9: Invoice Review Information Architecture + Visual System
- E10: Exception-First Invoice List Experience
- E11: Invoice Drill-Down and Review Actions
- E12: Responsive Quality, Review, and Approval Pack

epics.title: E9: Invoice Review Information Architecture + Visual System
epics.body: Lock the operator workflow, shared shell, visual system, and approval-quality frame set for the invoice review prototype.

epics.title: E10: Exception-First Invoice List Experience
epics.body: Design the list, range presets, summary band, filters, and system states so operators can scan and prioritize exceptions quickly.

epics.title: E11: Invoice Drill-Down and Review Actions
epics.body: Define the selected-invoice experience on desktop and mobile with metadata-first hierarchy, risk interpretation, and review actions.

epics.title: E12: Responsive Quality, Review, and Approval Pack
epics.body: Harden the prototype through responsive review, accessibility/readability checks, screenshot export, and explicit deferral of non-critical UX debt.

issues.title: [FE-801] Define operator task model and invoice review information architecture
issues.body:
Define the operator workflow for reviewing invoices across Today, Yesterday, This Week, and This Month.

Acceptance criteria:
- Shared workspace model is explicit
- Exception-first order is documented
- Desktop and mobile information architecture are aligned
- List/detail responsibilities are clearly separated

issues.title: [FE-802] Create desktop high-fidelity command-center frames for Today and This Month
issues.body:
Create approval-quality desktop frames for the Today and This Month presets.

Acceptance criteria:
- Shared shell is consistent across both frames
- Today emphasizes triage
- This Month shows broader analytical context
- Selected row and detail panel are visually stable

issues.title: [FE-803] Create mobile high-fidelity frames for Today list and invoice detail
issues.body:
Create approval-quality mobile frames for the Today list and the full-screen invoice detail state.

Acceptance criteria:
- Preset chips remain usable on mobile
- Cards replace the desktop table
- Metadata-first detail hierarchy is preserved
- Sticky back and action behavior is visible

issues.title: [FE-804] Build realistic invoice fixture set covering confidence, duplicate, overdue, municipal, and uncategorized states
issues.body:
Create a deterministic prototype fixture set derived from the repo invoice domain.

Acceptance criteria:
- Includes normal, low-confidence, duplicate, overdue, quarantined, uncategorized, municipal, and mixed-source states
- Supports all four presets
- Supports both list and detail views

issues.title: [FE-901] Design invoice row/card system for dense desktop and mobile scanning
issues.body: Design the row and card system so operators can scan vendor, amount, dates, source, and exception states quickly.

issues.title: [FE-902] Design range presets, summary band, and default sort behavior
issues.body: Design the four time presets, compact summary band, and exception-first default ordering behavior.

issues.title: [FE-903] Design filter drawer, saved filter shortcuts, and active filter chips
issues.body: Design a shallow, operator-fast filtering model with saved shortcuts and active filter visibility.

issues.title: [FE-904] Design empty, no-results, loading, and failure states for the list workspace
issues.body: Design the workspace states that keep the experience useful when data is missing, filtered out, loading, or failed.

issues.title: [FE-1001] Design desktop split-view drill-down hierarchy and metadata grouping
issues.body: Design the desktop detail panel hierarchy so structured facts, trust signals, and grouped metadata dominate over the document preview.

issues.title: [FE-1002] Design invoice action model: review, duplicate flag, note, category change, source open
issues.body: Design the action model for operator workflows directly from the detail pane.

issues.title: [FE-1003] Design mobile full-screen invoice detail flow with sticky facts/actions
issues.body: Design the mobile drill-down so the metadata-first review model survives the smaller viewport.

issues.title: [FE-1004] Validate drill-down behavior for low-confidence, duplicate, overdue, and quarantined invoices
issues.body: Validate that high-risk invoice states change the detail view hierarchy and messaging in useful ways.

issues.title: [FE-1101] Run responsive review across desktop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints
issues.body: Review the prototype at desktop, tablet, and mobile sizes and fix layout issues that compromise readability or workflow.

issues.title: [FE-1102] Run accessibility and readability pass for dense financial UI
issues.body: Review contrast, type sizing, chip readability, spacing, and dense-data clarity across the prototype.

issues.title: [FE-1103] Export stakeholder approval screenshot pack from the prototype
issues.body: Export the four primary approval frames into a clean stakeholder screenshot pack.

issues.title: [FE-1104] Fix critical UX defects or create laser-focused follow-up issues for approved deferrals
issues.body: Resolve critical UX defects before sign-off and explicitly create follow-up issues for non-critical approved deferrals.
